effect: Your attack cards deal double damage in the next combat
You regenerate four health per turn in the next combat
You are invisible until you interact with the dungeon
You receive double the gold from the next combat
In the next combat, draw a temporary fireball card at the start of each turn
You have +3 actions for the next combat
You begin the next combat with two random pieces of equipment
Your opponent loses 3 current and maximum health at the start of each of your turns in the next combat
Start the next fight with 3 additional cards
Your maximum hand size is increased by one in the next fight
Generate three health packs at random on the map
In the next fight, damage you deal is piercing
In the next fight, whenever you play an Action card, draw a card
In the next fight, at the beginning of each turn, return all Spell cards from your graveyard to your hand
In the next fight, whenever you play an Action card, your opponent is Poisoned for 1
In the next fight, you have 20 additional health
In the next fight, you and your opponent swap decks
In the next combat, whenever you would draw a card during your turn, instead search your deck for a card and put it into your hand
In the next combat, whenever you would draw a card during your turn, deal 3 physical damage to your opponent
Start the next combat with 30 additional mana
